offline.library: You’re offline. Your Library items stay on this device — play or open anything already saved. New searches need a connection.
offline.trendingHub: You’re offline. Showing the last cached trending items where available; reconnect to refresh from the Internet Archive.
offline.generic: You’re offline. Open content from your Library or revisit cached pages. Real-time search and new listings need a connection.

librarySyncNotice: Back online — library changes can sync in the background.
